CustomField.description: Total of all Fee balances on Account
CustomField.formula:
/*Current_Bal_Attorney_Fees__c + Current_Bal_General_Fees__c + Current_Bal_Court_Fees__c + Current_Bal_NSF_Fees__c + Current_Bal_Other_Fees__c*/
Recoverable_Fee__c + Non_Recoverable_Fee__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total of all Fee balances on Account
CustomField.label: Fee Recovery
